translations.en: rLeonna
translations.zh: 里歐娜

translations.en: a smartly dressed woman. Her smile has a delightful subtlety to it.
translations.zh: 一名衣著入時之女子，笑容含蓄而宜人。

translations.en: "Yes, $P?"
You fail to get her attention in the midst of the brawl.
translations.zh: 鬧鬨之中，汝終究未能引起她注意。

translations.en: Her face lights up as she recognizes you. "Hello again, $P!"
translations.zh: 她認出汝，面露喜色：「又見面了，$P！」

translations.en: "Oh, you must be $P, the famous Avatar! 'Tis an honor to meet thee."
translations.zh: 「噢，汝定是$P，那位赫赫有名之聖者！與汝相見乃我之榮。」

translations.en: "My name is Leonna."
translations.zh: 「我名里歐娜。」

translations.en: "I used to @captain my own ship."
translations.zh: 「我曾自己@captain（船長）一艘船。」

translations.en: "But I fell on hard times, and now I sail with @Leodon on the @Hind."
translations.zh: 「後來時運不濟，目下與@Leodon（黎奧）頓共航於@Hind（號）之上。」

translations.en: "A fine old vessel, the Golden Hind."
translations.zh: 「金鹿乃艘上好的老船。」

translations.en: "Alas, I have little to do while she's being @repaired."
translations.zh: 「惜哉，船@repaired（修繕）期間我也閒著無事。」

translations.en: "There's none I'd rather ship out with."
translations.zh: 「再無更願與之同航之人。」

translations.en: "Captain who? I know lots of Captains..."
translations.zh: 「哪位船長？我認識的船長可多哉……」

translations.en: "Captain who? I know lots of Captains..."
translations.zh: 「哪位船長？我認識的船長可多哉……」

translations.en: When you say 'Captain,' all the pirates at the table turn to you expectantly.
translations.zh: 汝一說「船長」，桌邊海盜眾人皆殷殷望汝。

translations.en: When they realize you weren't talking to them, they return to their business.
translations.zh: 見汝並非與彼等交談，眾人重又各做各事。

translations.en: "Captain John is a madman!"
translations.zh: 「約翰船長乃一狂人！」

translations.en: "He went down in Hythloth seeking a way to the other side of the world."
translations.zh: 「他下了希斯洛斯地穴，欲尋通往世界另一端之路。」

translations.en: "Said he was going to kill as many @gargoyles as he could before they got him."
translations.zh: 「他言道：『在彼等取我性命前，盡可能屠戮@gargoyles（魔像族）族。』」

translations.en: "That's not true!" says Captain Fox. "I can tell you what really happened."
translations.zh: 「非也！」狐狸船長道，「實情如何，我可告知汝。」

translations.en: "Please, let's not talk about them."
translations.zh: 「拜託，莫提及彼輩。」

translations.en: "Talk to you later."
translations.zh: 「下回再敘。」

translations.en: "I can't help you with that."
translations.zh: 「此事我幫不上忙。」

translations.en: "I'd be glad to join you--but I have already!"
translations.zh: 「我自當樂意入伙——但我已在汝隊中啦！」

translations.en: "Could I join your party, perhaps?"
translations.zh: 「或可讓我入汝之伙？」

translations.en: "Okay. I guess I'll just stay here for now."
translations.zh: 「好。那我便暫且留此。」

translations.en: "Not while you're in that thing!"
translations.zh: 「汝乘那玩意兒可不行！」

translations.en: "You have enough traveling with you already."
translations.zh: 「汝隨行之人已夠多了。」

translations.en: "But if you ask one of them to @leave first, I'd be happy to join you."
translations.zh: 「但汝若先請其中一人@leave（離隊），我便樂意入伙。」

translations.en: "Oh good! I bet we'll meet a lot of interesting men..."
translations.zh: 「太好了！我想我等定能遇上不少有趣的男子……」

translations.en: "I'd have to @join you before I could leave, silly!"
translations.zh: 「我得先@join（入伙）才能離隊，傻孩子！」

translations.en: "Let's get our feet back on solid ground first, okay?"
translations.zh: 「先讓我等腳踏實地再說，可好？」

translations.en: "Okay. I'll go wait back at the Fallen Virgin."
translations.zh: 「好。我便回墜貞酒館等候。」

translations.en: "You're more likely to need this equipment than I am."
translations.zh: 「這些裝備留在汝身上更有用處。」

translations.en: She sets down everything she was carrying before walking off.
translations.zh: 她放下身上所有物事，方才轉身離去。

translator_notes: Leonna = Leodon 的大副，可加入隊伍。Buc's Den 海盜酒館的常客之一。Hythloth = U4-5 八大地穴之一。
